content.en:
Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce, Longmen Stone City Branch.

Ye Tian came here and got a glimpse of the Terran Realm Gods here, the half-step Eternal Realm Gods, and the Eternal Dao Realm.

After these human powerhouses saw Ye Tian, they were all excited, and at the same time, they were relieved.

After all, during this time, they were really suppressed a little ~ miserable.

Now that Ye Tian is here, they naturally don't have to worry.

......

"The branch of the Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce, the most powerful should be this middle-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm, the Kunshan Realm-God!"

Ye Tian was going to talk to this Kunshan Realm God.

He didn't expect to drive the Skyscanner Chamber of Commerce away, he just hoped that the Skyscanner Chamber of Commerce wouldn't come to trouble the Terran Holy State Chamber of Commerce, that's all.

Thereupon.

Ye Tianxian asked the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce to contact the Kunshan Realm God of the Tianxun Chamber of Commerce branch for an appointment.

Soon, the time was negotiated.

this day.

Ye Tian and the Kunshan Realm God met in a restaurant in Longmen Stone City.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God!"

"Kunshan Realm God!"

Ye Tian and this Kunshan Realm God greeted each other.

Immediately, they began to discuss the topic of the living space of the Chamber of Commerce.

"Ye Tianjie God, almost all the business in this territory is occupied by our Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce, but your Terran Holy Kingdom has recently intervened in a big way, isn't this appropriate? If you directly withdraw from the market in this area, our Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce will not pursue the losses you have caused us!"

The god of the Kunshan Realm said proudly.

Ye Tian said in a deep voice: "First, our Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce will not withdraw from this area, and second, your Heavenly Scanner Chamber of Commerce may think too highly of yourself, just because you are not enough for us to withdraw from the market in this area." "

Hearing this, the face of the Kunshan Realm God changed drastically.

He didn't expect Ye Tian to dare to talk to the Sky Scan Chamber of Commerce like this, is this to be hard steel with them?

The Kunshan Realm God said coldly: "Ye Heaven Realm God, your Terran Saint Country Chamber of Commerce is also a mid-level Eternal Realm God Realm, it is too easy for us to suppress you, if it were not for the regulations of the Realm Court, it would only take a little means to crush you." "

"Really?"

Ye Tian smiled slightly: "In this way, you can send a realm god to fight with me, if you can defeat me, I will withdraw from this area immediately, otherwise you are not allowed to interfere in our business, how about it?"

"Oh, what's in it for us?"

The Kunshan Realm God did not agree.

"That's it, if I lose, I'll give you a thousand Eternal Realm Stones!" Ye Tian said.

A Thousand Eternal Boundary Stones!

The Kunshan Realm God was a little moved, and immediately nodded in agreement: "Okay!"

Immediately, the two sides agreed to fight in a void on the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, and the time was set for a short time.

......

Skyscanner Chamber of Commerce.

The Kunshan Realm God returned to the headquarters to meet the leader of the Skyscanner Chamber of Commerce, the Skyscanner Realm God, and the only Realm God of the Skyscanner Chamber of Commerce who has condensed the five Eternal Realm Spirits.

As long as the Kunshan Realm God is not sure of defeating Ye Tian, although he doesn't know much about Ye Tian's strength, but this kind of big thing can't be sloppy, and 100% victory must be guaranteed.

Therefore, he needs to ask the Heaven Patrol Realm God to take action, so that it will be foolproof.

Soon, he met the Skyshaven God.

"Chief!"

The Kunshan Realm God said respectfully.

"What's the matter?" asked the Skyscanner God.

The Kunshan Realm God immediately told the story.

The Heavenly Scun Realm God said slightly: "It's just a small thing, but if you make a thousand Eternal Boundary Stones for nothing, if you don't do it in vain, I will go and defeat that Ye Heavenly Realm God, and I will give you three hundred of the one thousand Eternal Boundary Stones I earned." "

"Thank you, Chief!"

The Kunshan Realm God thanked.

However, from beginning to end, they did not seriously investigate Ye Tian's situation.

If you go to the Eternal Realm to investigate, you will know that Ye Tian is terrible, and you will definitely not dare to rashly agree to such a battle.

this day.

The day of the battle has arrived.

Ye Tian had come to the place of battle early, and after a while, the Heavenly Scun Realm God and the Kunshan Realm God had arrived.

Ye Tian stood up and said, "Who will the Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce send out?"

"Me!"

The Skyscanner God stepped out.

"This is the leader of our Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce, the Sky Scanner Realm God!" the Kunshan Realm God introduced.

"Skyscanner God, don't talk nonsense, let's do it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

The Heaven Scun Realm God also wanted to fight quickly, and directly used the Eternal Realm Spirit Technique to kill Ye Tian.

However.

After Ye Tian performed the Tianyan Peng Light Technique, he directly urged the Spear of the Sun and hit the Heaven Scun Realm God with just one blow.

Rumble!!!

The body of the Skyscanner God was knocked out and his flesh cracked.

If Ye Tian cast the Tianyan Red Dragon Flame, the Heaven Scun Realm God would be killed directly.

But at this moment, the Heaven Scun Realm God was in great pain, and his injuries were not light.

Swish!

Ye Tian killed again, and the God of the Heavenly Scun Realm tried his best to resist, but he still couldn't withstand Ye Tian's attack, and was instantly pierced, and he was severely injured.

"Throw in the towel!"

The God of the Sky Scun Realm was frightened and hurriedly said.

At this time.

The Terran Realm Gods were also shocked when they saw Ye Tian's strength for the first time, they didn't expect that the Heaven Patrol Realm Gods who had condensed the five Eternal Realm Spirits were far from Ye Tian's opponents.

At this moment, they were extremely proud and proud.

"Sky Scanner Realm God, from today onwards, it should be no problem for the Terran Saint Kingdom Chamber of Commerce to do business in this area, right?"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"No problem!" said the Sky Scanner God quickly.

"That's good!"

Ye Tian left with the gods of the human race.

And the eyes of the Sky Scun Realm God were still afraid and fearful.

Kunshan Realm Divine Dao: "Chief, the strength of this Ye Heaven Realm God can be comparable to the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak powerhouse?"

"No, it's pretty much the same!" The Sky Scun Realm God said in fear: "His cultivation is not as high as mine, but his combat power is so terrifying, either he has an incomparably powerful treasure that can greatly enhance his combat power, or his Eternal Dao Seed Foundation is extremely strong, and the Eternal Realm Spirit is not simple, so he can exert such a strength against the sky." "

"Chief, in the future, we really want to let the Terran Saint Kingdom Chamber of Commerce do business here?" asked the Kunshan Realm God.

"I don't agree, can you beat the Ye Heavenly Realm God?Do you want to find death?"

"Don't dare!"

The Kunshan Realm God shook his head.

"Let's go, don't provoke the Ye Heavenly Realm God and the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce in the future!"

The Sky Scun Realm God reminded.

"Yes!" the Kunshan Realm God nodded.

......

Subsequently, Ye Tian returned to the Terran Holy Country, and he didn't need to take care of the affairs of the Chamber of Commerce, he had already shocked the Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce, and I believed that the Sky Scanner Chamber of Commerce would not dare to embarrass the Terran Holy Country Chamber of Commerce.
